# FSItem.Identifier

**Enumeration**

The unique identifier for an item.

## Declaration

```swift
enum Identifier
```

## Overview

Use this type when packing items for an enumeration in [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSDirectoryEntryPacker/packEntry(name:itemType:itemID:nextCookie:attributes:)]. Either provide a unique identifier like an inode number, or one of the special enumeration cases this type defines, like [doc://FSKit/documentation/FSKit/FSItem/Identifier/rootDirectory].

## Working with special identifiers

- **FSItem.Identifier.invalid**: The identifier for an invalid item.
- **FSItem.Identifier.parentOfRoot**: The identifier for an item that serves as the parent of the root directory.
- **FSItem.Identifier.rootDirectory**: The item identifier for the root directory.

## Working with raw values

- **init(rawValue:)**

## Identifying an item

- **FSItem.ItemType**: An enumeration of item types, such as file, directory, or symbolic link.

## Conforms To

- BitwiseCopyable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- RawRepresentable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
